prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-5INPOCKETKNIFE-HOWWOL Product Type: KNIFE Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Clip Point Blade Pocket Knife 5 Inch Window Punch Military Men Description: Be ready for everyday tasks and outdoor adventures with the ASR Outdoor Clip Point Folding Pocket Knife. Designed for reliability and convenience, this folding blade is made from durable 440 stainless steel and built to handle a wide range of cutting needs. The 3mm-thick blade offers solid performance for camping, hiking, and daily use.

The ergonomic handle provides a secure, comfortable grip and showcases detailed Howling Wolf artwork for added character. For emergency preparedness, the knife includes a built-in window punch and seat belt cutter, offering extra peace of mind while traveling.

A sturdy metal pocket clip allows you to keep the knife securely attached when not in use. Whether for everyday carry, outdoor activities, or as a thoughtful gift for collectors, this tool delivers dependable functionality and rugged style. Search Terms: camping pocket knife; folding knife outdoor; clip point blade; stainless steel knife; emergency window punch; belt cutter tool; EDC folding knife; survival gear; howling wolf handle; utility knife camping; travel safety tool Features: - DURABLE 440 STAINLESS STEEL BLADE - Reliable clip point blade with a sturdy 3mm thickness for everyday tasks, outdoor use, and general cutting needs. - CLIP POINT Pocket KnifeSECURE, COMFORTABLE GRIP - Ergonomic handle design provides stability and control, featuring detailed Howling Wolf artwork for added visual appeal.Sturdy & Sharp Blade - 5" | 8.75" Overall Length - BUILT-IN SAFETY TOOLS - Includes an integrated window punch and seat belt cutter for emergency preparedness while traveling or on the road. - CONVENIENT CARRY DESIGN - Equipped with a strong metal pocket clip that keeps the knife securely attached and easily accessible when not in use. - VERSATILE OUTDOOR EVERYDAY USE - A practical tool for camping, hiking, and daily tasks, and a great gift option for collectors and outdoor enthusiasts. === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 5 Inch Clip Point Pocket Knife Howling Wolf

tokens.name: Clip Point Pocket Knife Howling Wolf

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 5in Clip Point Pocket Knife

anthropic.title_differentiation: 440 Stainless Steel Blade, Window Punch, Seat Belt Cutter, Metal Pocket Clip, Ergonomic Handle

openai.title_differentiation: 440 Stainless Steel Blade, Window Punch And Seat Belt Cutter, Ergonomic Howling Wolf Handle, Pocket Clip
